---
title: "About Me"
---

I combine strong analytical skills with practical experience in data processing and spatial analysis. 

### Technical Skills
* **Programming & Data Analysis:** Python, R, SQL, Excel
* **Geographic Information Systems:** ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, spatial joins and visualizations

Feel free to connect with me!

* **LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/in/maayan-sarfati-098556383/]
* **GitHub:** [https://github.com/maayansarfati]
* **Email:** [maayansarfati@gmail.com]
